mapper.insert: insert into kb_bases (id, kb_key, name, description) values (#{id}, #{kbKey}, #{name}, #{description})
mapper.select: select b.id, b.kb_key, b.name, b.description, b.created_at, coalesce(dc.cnt, 0)::bigint as document_count, dc.last_doc_at as last_ingest_at from kb_bases b left join (select base_id, count(*)::bigint as cnt, max(d.created_at) as last_doc_at from kb_documents d group by base_id) dc on dc.base_id = b.id order by b.created_at desc
